nodes.label: AI as initial filter for competitor research
nodes.grounding_span: AI will speed up the process of filtering out the competitors we don't need to be concerned with

nodes.label: AI reliability for fine details
nodes.grounding_span: it can be in the fine details. For instance. a monthly fee is not the same as a four week fee

nodes.label: AI understanding of user intent
nodes.grounding_span: There are times it takes multiple turns and rewording before you finally get to where it understands what is being asked

nodes.label: Hands-on verification of AI output
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer hands on research of a specific competitor website as follow up to confirm what AI has supplied

nodes.label: Competitive intelligence and market awareness
nodes.grounding_span: providing us with the opportunity to fill any gaps in what is being offered in the industry

nodes.label: Accuracy and trustworthiness in business decisions
nodes.grounding_span: to look for any additional details it may have considered not important
